overview: This Mono-Black Pauper deck utilizes cheap, aggressive creatures and board-wide pressure to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize. Defile provides constant life drain and creature attrition, while Troll of Khazad-dum offers efficient early threats. Cast Down ensures you can bypass larger blockers to close out games quickly.
win_conditions: Combat damage from early aggressive creatures
Defile upkeep life loss combined with board presence
Direct damage from Troll of Khazad-dum triggers

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two one- or two-drops
Hands containing Defile or Troll of Khazad-dum
Hands with early removal like Cast Down
mulligan_criteria: Hands with only three-drops or higher
Hands with multiple removal spells but no creatures

early_game: Play cheap creatures immediately to establish board presence
Cast Defile as soon as possible to start life drain and weaken opposing creatures
Use Cast Down to remove early blockers or finish the opponent
mid_game: Maintain pressure with additional Troll of Khazad-dum copies
Trade efficiently to keep Defile's damage output relevant
Prioritize removal for threats that can stall your aggression
late_game: Push for lethal with remaining creatures and Defile damage
Use Cast Down to clear the path for a final combat
Accept trades if you are ahead on life total and board state

key_cards.name: Defile
key_cards.notes: Play early to maximize upkeep damage and weaken opposing creatures over time. Protect it when possible but be willing to trade it for board control.

key_cards.name: Troll of Khazad-dum
key_cards.role: Early aggressive threat and spot removal
key_cards.notes: Deploy on turn one or two to apply immediate pressure. Use its enter-the-battlefield damage to kill small creatures or chip away at the opponent's life total.

key_cards.name: Cast Down
key_cards.notes: Hold for the opponent's turn to maximize its impact. Use it to clear blockers before attacking or to finish off an opponent who is low on life.

sequencing_tips: Cast Defile before playing creatures to immediately weaken the board
Save Cast Down for the opponent's turn to maximize its impact
Use Troll of Khazad-dum's trigger to remove blockers before attacking with it

matchups.advice: Prioritize keeping Defile to kill their small creatures and buy time. Use Cast Down on their biggest threats to maintain board control.
Defile is highly effective against their low-toughness creatures. Use Cast Down to remove larger threats that can block your Trolls.
Apply maximum early pressure before they stabilize. Use Troll of Khazad-dum to chip away at their life total and force them to use removal inefficiently.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Defile, Troll of Khazad-dum, Cast Down

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Defile, Cast Down, Troll of Khazad-dum
